name: node-neo-async
title: node-neo-async
description:
faster replacement for Async
Neo-Async is thought to be used as a drop-in replacement for Async, it almosti
fully covers its functionality and runs faster.
.
Async is a utility module which provides straight-forward, powerful
functions for working with asynchronous Javascript. Although originally
designed for use with Node, it can also be used directly in the
browser.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-neo-async because faster replacement for Async.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-neo-async as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-neo-async with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-neo-async --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
